biggestLearning: My biggest learning in EWTC is that being a warrior isn’t about fighting others — it’s about mastering myself. I’ve realized that true strength isn’t measured by how many times I win, but by how many times I rise after falling. This journey taught me to face my fears with love, embrace discomfort with courage, and take full responsibility for my growth. Transformation begins the moment I choose awareness, commitment, and heart — and that’s the kind of warrior I’m becoming: one who leads with purpose, resilience, and love.
favoriteMoment: My favorite moment in EWTC was witnessing how everyone was willing to help and lift each other up. More than 30 countries came together in one camp, standing as one nation — united by heart, not by title. In that space, there were no ranks or labels, just humility, teamwork, and pure connection as we faced every obstacle together.
wordsOfEncouragement: To my fellow warriors — thank you for fighting alongside me, not with weapons, but with heart, courage, and love. I’m deeply grateful for every hug, cheer, and moment of support we shared. We came from different parts of the world, yet stood as one nation. You reminded me that true strength comes from unity and that healing happens when we rise together. From my heart to yours — thank you for being part of my warrior journey.” 💖⚔️
funFact: I ride motorcycle, my passion is to photograph other persons, random night rides with my furbaby. And I’m ambidextrous.
valueAdd: I’ll uplift my nation by being the kind of warrior who leads with heart — inspiring others to fight for their dreams, rise after every fall, and believe in what’s possible. Change begins within us, and I choose to be the spark that ignites strength and hope in others.

biggestLearning: There are so many learnings, it is very hard to decide on one. I think the most surprising learning for me was that I am able to connect to people very quickly and I am able to be a great supporter. Also I love that through PEAKS and PLAYGROUND I discovered that leadership can be done from the background. Leadership is about helping others to see their own greatness and to be brave enough to step into that. I used to be the person that always goes first, but through warrior I learned that there are other ways of great leadership and I loved how it resonates with my teampartners and I loved to see them grow. This is the spirit I want to carry and bring to the world.
favoriteMoment: Again, there were so many moments it is hard to decide. But what sticks with me is PREDICAMENT I have done on the last day. Having survived PREDICAMENT, especially after the fighting rounds and when the trainer announced that the fight is over, was very emotional and relieving for me. Although my body was so ready to fight through the next round! ;) Also the meditation on death (in the pause of PREDICAMENT) was very healing to me. Most of all I found peace in this exercise. I now feel like when it is time for me to say goodbye and to die I could do this with a pure heart and soul and in peaceful connection with my family.
wordsOfEncouragement: This whole experience has changed my life in so many ways, that it is very hard to describe or to find any words for that. I was shaken to my bone, emotionally, physically, mentally and spiritually exhausted and building up from the ground again. I am so thankful for everyone that was with me in this experience, because you are the ones that made this experience possible and so special at the same time. I am happy for all the lessons I saw and received. I am grateful for all the people smiling at me, listening or sharing their words with me, sitting with me on dinner, walking with me in the jungle, dancing with me and around me and most of all for this unconditional support I never experienced before. You are all wonderful human beings <3 Thank you, thank you, thank you for being YOU.
funFact: I used to be a professional chess player and even participated multiple times in world championships. Although I dont play regularly anymore (I have 3 kids and this hobby is very time consumive), this is still a very good door opener because instantly people expect me to be very smart and I love that ;) (If you are up for a quick match you are always welcome)
valueAdd: What I bring to the nation is light and inspiration. Light because I am able to see light in the darkest places, even if the persons themselves cant see it. I want to be the one that always brightens up the day of everybody else - with my energy, my passion, my heart and my ability to truely listen and understand. Inspiration because my purpose is in teaching, supporting and leading others into their own greatness. So I will always be there if someone reaches out to me, giving unconditional support, listening and finding solutions where others cant see them. In professional termins I can support on anything related to recruiting, teambuilding und business leadership, sales, processes and systematization for scaling.

I would love to become a speaker on the topics of leadership, teambuilding and business growth with heart and values and build my own community on these topics too. Whoever has already done this or is building the same, please get in touch. I would love to collaborate and hold each other accountable.
Also my husband and I have 3 very lovely kids (born in 2016, 2021, 2023) and although I love them from the very bottom of my heart this can be quite challenging with growing our businesses, wanting to travel, wanting to be on stages at the same time. I would love to connect with other families who experience the same challenges to give each other emotional support & friendship and maybe even joint travel activities.

biggestLearning: I learned that regret is unfair. I used to blame myself for not being “good enough,” but now I realize that every version of me was already doing her best with the capacity she had. Instead of regret, I choose grace. I choose to thank my past self for bringing me here. EWC reminded me that being a warrior isn’t about fighting others, it’s about mastering my own energy. To rise when it’s hard, to stay grounded in chaos, and to keep showing up with courage and purpose. The Warrior Spirit lives not in perfection, but in persistence.
favoriteMoment: Omg honestly, I signed up for Quantum Leap just because I wanted to take TTT! I wasn’t even interested in EWC at first 😅 But it turned out to be one of the best experiences of my life! Thank you so, so much everyone , truly! 💛 My favorite moment? I honestly can’t choose, because every single one meant something special to me: 1️⃣ Predicament — This one made me so much tougher. And if you’ve heard the story about someone being choked and thrown to the floor... yep, that was me! 😂 It was painful, but it taught me resilience and strength I never knew I had. I’ll never forget it and I’m actually thankful for every second of it. 2️⃣ Playground — After being on crutches for more than three months from a broken leg, being able to play, run, and dance in the rain again was such a healing moment. I felt so alive like I got a piece of myself back 🌧️💃 3️⃣ Purification — This process helped me finally feel at peace and comfortable with myself. I let go of so much — expectations, guilt, and old stories. It was truly freeing. 4️⃣ Peaks — This one taught me patience. I’ve always wanted things to move fast, but EWC made me realize that real growth takes time. Step by step is still progress — and that’s enough "ONE STEP AT A TIME" So honestly, I can’t choose a single “favorite” moment, because every moment with you all was unforgettable. I love you guys so, so much! AHO! ❤️
wordsOfEncouragement: To my beloved Warriors, It’s hard to put into words how much this journey means to me. EWC wasn’t just an experience , it was a mirror. Through each of you, I saw pieces of myself that I had forgotten… the strength I once doubted, the light I tried to hide, the love I didn’t always give myself. You reminded me that healing doesn’t happen alone , it happens when souls meet, when we walk together through fire, tears, and laughter, and come out stronger on the other side. Thank you for being real. For showing up..... raw, messy, brave, and full of heart. Because of you guys, I’ve learned that being a Warrior is not about fighting the world, but about becoming the best version of myself. No matter where life takes us, I know our spirits will always be connected — one heartbeat, one nation, one Warrior family. Forever grateful. AHO AHO AHO !
funFact: Hi! I’m Elise from Indonesia — but most people know me as the balloon girl 🎈 I’ve been running my business Ballooney since 2016, where we create joyful balloon decorations, floral arrangements, and event designs that make every celebration unforgettable. What started as a small passion project has now grown into a creative company that celebrates life, love, and all the moments in between 💖 Besides running Ballooney, I’m also a trainer at John Robert Powers, where I teach Personal Branding and Communication. I love helping people express their authentic selves, find their confidence, and shine — because I believe everyone has a story that deserves to be seen and heard ✨ I’m also passionate about giving back. I founded a social movement called “The Happiness Project,” where we share happiness with anyone, through simple acts of kindness. Our donors — whom we lovingly call Happiness Heroes — have helped us build a school for children with special needs in North Lombok, renovate an under-bridge school, restore a small mosque in a scavenger village, provide bicycles for school kids, etc. And we’re not stopping there — our next project in 2026 is to help bring clean water access to one of the underprivileged areas in Indonesia. It’s one of our most exciting yet challenging projects so far, and I truly hope and pray that it will succeed. Because at the end of the day, kindness is what keeps the world alive — it connects us, heals us, and reminds us that even the smallest act can make a big difference 🌈 Outside of work, I’m a big nature lover. I enjoy freediving, the ocean, the mountains, and almost any kind of sport — that’s where I feel most alive, free, and connected to life itself 🌿 If we share the same wavelength, let’s play, explore, and create something beautiful together! 🤍
valueAdd: I’d love to uplift our Nation by sharing what I do best and bringing good energy wherever I go! 💫 1️⃣ Social Media & Content Strategy — If anyone needs ideas or guidance for content creation, feel free to reach out! I’d be happy to share my secret 3 content pillars and 10 content formats to help your message shine online. 2️⃣ Teamwork & Communication Training — If your company or community needs a coach to strengthen teamwork, I can help your team move from working together to winning together through fun, practical exercises and real-life applications. 3️⃣ Adventure & Nature Buddy — If you ever need a travel buddy who loves nature, I’m in! I’m always up for hiking, diving, or exploring the beauty of this world 🌿🌊 4️⃣ Party Buddy — I may not drink much, but I’m definitely full of life! Whether it’s a celebration, dance night, or spontaneous hangout, I’ll bring good vibes and positive energy wherever we go 🥳💃
supportNeeded: Business collaboration, Friendship & community, Traveling buddy / adventure partner, Hobby partner (e.g. fitness, art, music, etc.), Skill exchange / learning
supportNeededList: Hobby partner (e.g. fitness, art, music, etc.)
supportDetails:
Right now, I’m looking for friends and fellow Warriors who share the same passion for growth, adventure, and meaningful connections 🌿

I’d love to meet people who:
🌊 Love traveling and nature — I’m a freediver and I dream of exploring more of the world’s most beautiful oceans together.

💥 Have that adrenaline-junkie spirit — skydiving is on my bucket list, and I’d love to share those once-in-a-lifetime experiences with people who live fully and fearlessly.

🏃🏻‍♀️ Are into sports and challenges — I’m training toward my first full marathon (and maybe even an Ironman someday, haha!) so having friends who push their limits would be amazing.

💰 Have strong skills in financial and business management — I want to learn more about growing wealth wisely and building true financial freedom within the next five years.

Overall, I’m looking for people who are curious, courageous, and committed to becoming the best version of themselves — people who can walk, grow, and dream together with me 💫
topGoals:
My next three goals and commitments are all about growth — inside and out 🌿

1. I’m currently doing my 66 Days Challenge, where I wake up early around 5–6 AM and start my day with deep work. For me, it’s not just about waking up early, but about training myself to stay consistent, to do what’s hard, and to keep showing up even when I don’t feel like it. Because I believe discipline is the bridge between dreams and reality 🌅

2. I’m working toward achieving financial freedom in less than five years. I want to learn how to manage my personal and business finances better, build systems that work for me & my business, and create long-term stability — not only to live comfortably, but so I can give and serve more freely 💰✨

3.I want to be a blessing to others — to my family, my friends, my team, my community, and everyone around me. I want my life to be meaningful, to inspire, and to lift others higher. Because at the end of the day, the true measure of success is how much love and light we can share with the world.

biggestLearning: À travers les exercices, j’ai appris à m’aimer comme je suis et ne plus faire attention aux regards des autres! Je m’aime inconditionnellement et ce feu que j’ai en moi restera à jamais vivant!
favoriteMoment: Predicament a été révélateur où j’ai énormément pleuré mais j’ai tout tout et encore tout lâché, ça a radicalement explosé et j’ai ressenti un soulagement incroyable
wordsOfEncouragement: Vous êtes tous des Warriors incroyables et merveilleux! Cet amour inconditionnel que chacun de vous émettez est contagieux et c’est le plus beau cadeau que vous puissiez faire à vous, à votre famille et amis et ainsi qu’à tout votre entourage. Cet amour se repend énergétiquement dans le monde. À travers l’amour nous pouvons conquérir toutes nos ambitions ✌️💪❤️
funFact: Lors de nos vacances familiales, mon compagnon, nos quatre enfants et moi partagions une soirée mémorable avec des amis rencontrés sur place — qui, par hasard, habitaient à quelques kilomètres de chez nous en Belgique. L’ambiance était parfaite : rires, joie, bienveillance… et, disons-le, quelques verres de trop ! La chaleur aidant, l’alcool m’est montée à la tête plus vite que prévu, et j’ai soudain ressenti un immense élan d’amour pour… tout le monde. Je me promenais dans le club en déclarant à qui voulait l’entendre combien je les aimais — même mon Mojito a eu droit à une déclaration avant que je ne l’abandonne sur une table ! Portée par cet élan d’enthousiasme, je me suis mise à faire une véritable proclamation sur “l’amour et la joie de vivre”, promettant que je n’oublierais jamais cette soirée. Et pour couronner le tout, nous avons fini par croiser le manager du club — que j’ai embarqué dans une conversation des plus sérieuses pour lui confier notre “grand secret” : notre projet audacieux d’aller, à minuit, faire un plongeon dans la piscine… pourtant strictement interdite ! Il m’a écoutée avec un sourire complice, sans rien dire. Et finalement, il nous a laissés faire. Ce moment restera gravé : la lune, l’eau, les rires des enfants et ce sentiment de liberté pure. Le lendemain, le manager m’a avoué qu’il avait bien perçu ma “grande mission” de la soirée — un mélange de gentillesse, d’innocence et de cœur grand ouvert. Et depuis, quand on me demande ce qui me rend unique, je réponds sans hésiter : ma capacité à transformer un simple Mojito et une piscine interdite en une leçon de vie pleine d’amour et de légèreté. ❤️

industry: Education / Training / Coaching
coreCompetencies: Coaching / Mentoring, Emotional Support / Counseling, Leadership & Empowerment, Teaching / Training, Volunteering / Social Impact
biggestLearning: Warrior Camp helped me learn more about myself and about others. 1. We are one. Regardless of nationality, age, or background, we’re all connected by the same desire to grow and be free. 2. Everybody needs healing. Each person carries their own battles, and our role is to reach out especially to those who feel broken, lost, or incomplete. 3. A true warrior acts in spite of fear. Despite mood, doubt, or obstacles, we move forward. What once scared or intimidated me, I now see with compassion because even those who seem strong have wounds and stories of their own.
favoriteMoment: The Predicament Rotation and the Healing Dance on the third night “passing from my heart to yours.” It was pure connection, warmth, release, and love flowing freely.
wordsOfEncouragement: Thank you for holding space for me, and for everyone. Your energy and your presence truly moved me. I''m grateful to be on this journey together with all of you. Thank you for your kindness, your smiles, and for the conversations and interactions that made the days lighter and more meaningful. You made me feel that the camp could be the entire world if only we continue creating enlightened warriors out of everyone we meet. Because of you, I realized something powerful - everybody needs healing and forgiveness. Most people we encounter carry some guilt, anger, or resentment, toward themselves or others. We need to be kind to ourselves, and extend that same kindness to others. I bring that with me now with the people that I meet.
funFact: Hi! I’m a trainer by profession and by heart, but I’m also a true-blue introvert. I love watching people - observing how they are, how they respond, and understanding their stories. I’m also into sports, especially dragon boat paddling and swimming; I find peace in rhythm, in movement, and in the sway of the water. I’m powered by vitamin Sea (not C), I can never get enough of it. I find joy and peace in creative writing, whether it’s essays or simply sharing my thoughts. And I have a dog named Chippy. He’s so adorable that he can’t stand me for more than five minutes because I can’t resist squeezing him. I just can't contain myself because of how cute he is!
valueAdd: I bring heart, sincerity, and a deep desire to hold space for others. I listen with presence and offer gentle reminders of hope when things feel heavy. I have walked through my own seasons of transformation (with EWTC playing a big role in all this). I’ve learned that sometimes, the most powerful way to uplift others is simply to be there - fully, openly, and without judgment. We are all warriors here, sometimes life gets in the way, but as warriors, I believe that "not even bad days can stop us". So this is the energy that I want, I need and will contribute to the nation.
supportNeeded: Business collaboration, Accountability partner, Friendship & community, Mentorship / guidance, Skill exchange / learning
supportDetails:
The support I need right now is to stay consistent and intentional in this warrior energy as I tend to overthink and procrastinate so being surrounded by people who move with clarity and conviction helps ground and energize me.
Even though I don't interact much, the energy of this community uplifts me. Just being in the warrior nation keeps me inspired to take action, to show up, and to stay in motion.
I’d love to learn from those who’ve already built momentum in their training, speaking, or coaching journeys. People who can share what worked for them, who can challenge my thinking, and who can hold me accountable to keep growing forward.
My current focus right now is becoming a world-class speaker and bringing my message of transformation to bigger audiences. What I need most are connections, mentorship, and shared wisdom. People who can help me see things clearly and from a different perspective.

profession: Business Owner / Entrepreneur, Freelancer / Self-Employed, Photographer / Videographer
industry: Event / Entertainment / Creative Arts, Finance / Banking / Investment
coreCompetencies: Emotional Support / Counseling, Leadership & Empowerment, Mindfulness / Spiritual Guidance, Photography / Videography, System & Process Optimization
biggestLearning: My biggest learning from EWC is that real transformation happens at the edge of discomfort. Growth doesn’t come from staying within what’s safe or familiar — it requires courage, accountability, and a relentless commitment to becoming the best version of yourself. True change happens when you show up fully, face challenges head-on, and stay committed to learning and evolving through every challenge.
favoriteMoment: My favorite moment at EWC was when I truly felt the power of showing up fully and connecting with my fellow Warriors. There’s something incredible about being in an environment where everyone is committed to growth, accountability, and pushing beyond their limits. Whether it was during a challenging activity, a deep reflection session, or just sharing stories with others, I felt a sense of energy and inspiration that reminded me of the limitless potential within each of us. That collective drive and courage is a moment I’ll carry with me long after EWC.
wordsOfEncouragement: To my fellow Warriors, I am deeply grateful for your courage, authenticity, and dedication. Your willingness to face discomfort, embrace growth, and support each other is what makes this journey transformative. Together, we rise higher, break barriers, and create a ripple of impact far beyond ourselves.
funFact: I’m a multi-passionate creator and thinker who believes in living fully and growing continuously. For over 20 years, I’ve been a full-time professional photographer, capturing portraits, architecture, interiors, and events for leaders and brands across different countries. Beyond the camera, I’m also a dedicated day trader in U.S. stocks, options, and futures — a journey that fuels my obsession with mindset, discipline, and emotional mastery. My curiosity about human potential inspired me to create MasterYourMindAndLife.com, where I share tools and perspectives on personal growth and mental performance. When I’m not in front of charts or behind a lens, you’ll likely find me running, working out, hiking a mountain trail, or exploring new cultures around the world. Adventure, discipline, and expansion shape my lifestyle — and my guiding life principle is simple: live fully, grow continuously, and rise to your highest potential.
valueAdd: I believe that uplifting a nation begins with empowering its people. My way of contributing is by sharing what I practice: Cultivating a mindset of growth, discipline, and self-mastery. Encouraging others to live with purpose, resilience, and curiosity. When we strengthen ourselves — physically, mentally, and emotionally — we elevate the collective energy of our community. My intention is to lead through example, inspire others to unlock their potential, and help build a nation of individuals who think boldly, act intentionally, and continuously strive to become better versions of themselves.
supportNeeded: Business collaboration, Emotional support / motivation, Accountability partner, Friendship & community, Mentorship / guidance, Skill exchange / learning
supportDetails:
I’m looking to connect with people who are committed to growing, pushing limits, and becoming better every day. I appreciate individuals who take responsibility, stay disciplined, and show up with a curious and open mindset.

The Warriors I’d love to walk alongside are those who are pursuing mastery in their craft, mindset, and daily habits — people who show up fully, hold themselves to a high standard, yet lead with humility and compassion.

I’m here to both contribute and grow — to learn from others, share reflections from my journey, and support those striving to unlock their potential. Iron sharpens iron — and I’m excited to be part of a community where we encourage, elevate, and evolve together.
topGoals:
My Top 3 Goals & Commitments:

1. Achieve consistency in trading: Improve both my technical skills and master the emotional and psychological aspects of trading, while helping others develop the same consistency and mindset.

2. Grow MasterYourMindAndLife: Establish my presence as a mindset coach and create tools, content, and programs that help others strengthen their mindset, cultivate clarity, and unlock their full potential.

3.Enhance health, fitness, and adventure: Commit to regular running, strength training, hiking, and outdoor adventures, as well as traveling to new places, to build resilience, energy, and mental clarity.

These goals are aligned with my life principle — “Live life at its fullest potential” — and I welcome accountability, insights, and support from my fellow Warriors as I pursue them.
topGoalsList: My Top 3 Goals & Commitments:
Achieve consistency in trading: Improve both my technical skills and master the emotional and psychological aspects of trading, while helping others develop the same consistency and mindset.

Grow MasterYourMindAndLife: Establish my presence as a mindset coach and create tools, content, and programs that help others strengthen their mindset, cultivate clarity, and unlock their full potential.

Enhance health, fitness, and adventure: Commit to regular running, strength training, hiking, and outdoor adventures, as well as traveling to new places, to build resilience, energy, and mental clarity.
These goals are aligned with my life principle — “Live life at its fullest potential” — and I welcome accountability, insights, and support from my fellow Warriors as I pursue them.

biggestLearning: That I'm not alone!
favoriteMoment: Probably the moment that was the worst. The night session of the second day. After Playground and before Peaks. My knees where in big trouble, they were hurting and aching, and I was in the biggest pain in about 15 years or so. And this getting up and sitting down just broke me. But my fellow warriors took care of me, convinced me to get medical help from the team, and the team went through the exercise with me that night. What I learned from that night are a couple of things: it's ok to ask for help. It's ok to show that you have an issue. There is always a helping hand around. And I realized that I truly am someone who always finds a way and never give up.
wordsOfEncouragement: I'm thankful for this family I found here. For a long time I was looking for a tribe or community with like-minded people, who are always there when you need some help or encouragement. Where I can speak about the things that I'm interested in (e.g. Spiritual topics, magic, energies, money, creating dream lives, traveling, breaking the matrix) and don't get looks as if I'm an alien or so. So, thank you all for letting me being part of this family. And always follow your dreams and don't let anyone or anything stop you from turning those into reality!
funFact: My Childhood Hero and All Time Favorite Wrestler is Bret "Hitman" Hart. My All Time Favorite Female Wrestler is A.J. Lee. I love her!!!
valueAdd: I'm fantastic in cheering and empowering, keep you accountable, and breaking huge plans, goals, dreams, into small tangible action plans. I also find a solution for almost everything.
supportNeeded: Business collaboration, Friendship & community
supportDetails: I love to work together in a partnership or small team. Maybe some business collaboration. Topics could be manifestation, self-worth, helping people to find out what they truly desire and turn that into reality. I'm also looking for guests on my podcast "Dream and Wanderland" - what's your biggest dream so far? What struggles? How to overcome? What's next? Everyone has a dream and I'd love to talk about it and show others that it doesn't matter who you are, where you come from, what circumstances you are in, that it’s worth to follow your dreams anyways, and it's possible to make them come true!

biggestLearning: 在這次戰士露營，我最大的收穫是重拾與伴侶的連結。 我學會放下「只想把事情做好」的模式，轉而真正聽見、理解、陪伴。 我們的關係變得更開放、更靠近，也更像是在同一隊並肩作戰。
favoriteMoment: 最喜歡的是與夥伴、與伴侶深度連結的時刻。 當彼此放下防備、願意脆弱、也願意擁抱對方的時候， 我感到真正的力量在那裡。
wordsOfEncouragement: 謝謝每一位願意敞開、真誠面對自己的戰士。 因為有你們，我看到力量、勇氣、也看到希望。 我們一起成長、一起前進，下一次我們會更強大、更發光。
funFact: 我是一個相信「人生不能只有努力，還要幽默和好吃的飯」的人。熱愛嘗試新事物，擅長在工作認真、休息更認真的路上大步前進。最近最大的成就：成功讓兩隻貓覺得我是他們的僕人
valueAdd: 我相信影響一個國家，從影響一個人開始。 透過教育、分享與帶動行動，我希望幫助更多人看見自己的價值、培養獨立思考能力、提升自信與行動力，讓每一個人在自己的位置上都能更勇敢、更負責、更發光。 當個體變強，國家自然變強。 我要做的，是點亮更多力量、更多希望、更多能量，讓我們的下一代擁有更開放、更有創造力、更具使命感的社會環境。
supportNeeded: 商業合作, 旅行夥伴／冒險同伴, 技能交換／學習
supportDetails:
我正在尋找能一起成長、互相激勵、共同前進的夥伴。
那些願意責任大於藉口、行動大於抱怨、承諾大於情緒的人。

我希望與擁有勇氣、紀律與愛的人同行——
願意面對真實、接受挑戰，也願意把光投向自己與他人的戰士。

我們彼此扶持、彼此照亮，
不是為了比誰更厲害，而是一起變得強大，
共同創造更有意義、更有影響力的生命與事業。

industry: Business / Entrepreneurship, Design / Architecture / Interior, Education / Training / Coaching, Food & Beverage / Culinary, Real Estate / Property / Construction
coreCompetencies: Coaching / Mentoring, System & Process Optimization, Teaching / Training
biggestLearning: EWC taught me to give 100% to the critical task at hand, and if I must delay something, to do it consciously and step by step. This way I avoid overloading myself, maintain quality, and keep promises.
favoriteMoment: I can’t reduce EWC to a single moment. My ‘favorite moment’ was the continuum of all days—learning, drills, reflections, and breakthroughs—integrating with my body and mind. It was a holistic experience: spiritual (beyond expectations), physical (pushed my limits), mental (sharpened focus and discipline), and social (the tribe’s energy lifted me sky-high). That synergy is why I left EWC still ‘up there’—energized, aligned, and, yes, hyped—and I’ve kept that state of mind and body since. If I must name one thing, it’s the state itself: a sustained alignment where purpose, presence, and community lock in together. That state is my biggest souvenir from EWC—and my daily standard going forward.
wordsOfEncouragement: To our EWC Nation and Tribe, thank you. Your example lifted each other—and me. We showed up with strong bodies, open hearts, and a shared spirit. I’ll never forget when, as one tribe, we called for Protection from the Rain—and received it. That reminded me: power flows where energy goes. What I think, I speak. What I speak, I do. What I do, I have. Grateful for your courage, discipline, and love. Let’s keep walking together—strong, humble, and aligned. AHO, AHO, AHO.
funFact: I’m a hands-on generalist in construction—capable of planning and executing a wide range of building tasks myself. I enjoy personally building and fitting out small spaces. Beyond work, I’m active in sailing (certified sailing judge), snowboarding and other winter sports, scuba diving, motorcycle touring with regular seasonal riding, mountaineering, and golf (my handicap isn’t low).
valueAdd: I add value by building iconic, sustainable projects and developing our EWC ‘nation’ of leaders. Through Elitbau’s holistic, end-to-end approach—integrating strategy, design, finance, risk mitigation, and transparent execution—we reduce overruns, accelerate delivery, and create higher-paid jobs and opportunities across our community. I also mentor and cross-pollinate skills so Warriors grow, collaborate globally, and export our expertise.
supportNeeded: Business collaboration, Accountability partner, Friendship & community, Mentorship / guidance, Skill exchange / learning
supportDetails: Gorazd Dimnik and my company Elitbau specializes in comprehensive, end-to-end management of high-value real-estate projects. We’re looking for collaborators and mentors experienced in large-scale development, project finance, and international expansion. Ideal partners are values-driven, detail-oriented, and comfortable operating at premium quality standards. We’d love to attract Warriors with strong networks (investors, architects, MEP specialists, EPC contractors), plus people who geek out on process excellence, risk mitigation, and creating iconic assets.

wordsOfEncouragement: To my fellow Warriors— You are the rising stars who light the way for others, even when the path is steep. Thank you for trusting the process, for showing up with courage, and for honoring each other’s strengths with humility and grace. In every moment you choose to lift others above yourself, you build a legacy of compassion, resilience, and shared triumph. Echo this always: one step at a time, never give up, we are here for you. Keep shining, keep rising, and keep reminding the world that empathy is power, and together, we are unstoppable.
funFact: Phoebe Long is a visionary in special needs education whose journey began in 2000 supporting a child with Global Developmental Delay. As co-founder of Breakthru Enrichment Station and Breakthru Academy, she developed the 3P.L.A.Y. Framework—an emotionally safe, movement-based approach that empowers neurodivergent children to thrive. Using movement-based learning (MBL), reflex integration programs, RMTi, and Brain Gym®, Phoebe creates nurturing environments that foster confidence and connection. As international faculty for Breakthroughs International, she mentors doctors, educators, therapists, and parents across continents—transforming children and their families with empathy, resilience, and a legacy of inclusion and contribution.
valueAdd: Empathy and strength based approach

Love you all! 💙

biggestLearning: My greatest gain was rediscovering my own strength and sense of calling. I learned to face truth, cultivate self-awareness, and live with greater honesty — not to please expectations or choose comfort, but to be faithful to who I am becoming. I also learned the importance of presence and celebration, and how to be fully with myself. And I came to realize, more deeply than ever: a leader is not someone without fear, but someone who walks forward with love and conviction despite it.
favoriteMoment: I loved the moments when we opened our hearts together — sharing, crying, and then laughing again. It was a space where brave souls truly saw and supported one another. That feeling of not walking alone is something I will never forget.
wordsOfEncouragement: Thank you to every warrior who has walked this path together. Your courage, honesty, vulnerability, and strength remind me that we were not made into warriors — we always were. We simply remembered who we are. May we carry the light back into our daily lives, and prove through our actions that freedom, love, and strength are not slogans — they are our way of life. We walk together, until we reach the summit. See you at the top.

biggestLearning: That I am fully in control of my life. And that I teach people how to treat me — by what I allow, reinforce, and tolerate. The moment I truly understood that, I stopped waiting for change and decided to become the change.
favoriteMoment: Every single day brought its own magic — the intense activities, the incredible people I met, and the raw, powerful energy of the camp. The vibes, the breakthroughs, the late-night connections… all of it created memories that will stay with me forever.
wordsOfEncouragement: To every Warrior I met — thank you for showing up with your full heart. You reminded me what courage, authenticity, and unity truly look like. We pushed, cried, laughed, and grew together — and that bond is something I’ll carry for life. Remember this: You are stronger than you think, bigger than any obstacle, and capable of achieving anything you commit to. Keep acting in spite of fear, mood, or reason — and live like the Enlightened Warriors you are. ⚔️ All my love ❤️
funFact: I get random bursts of motivation at 1 a.m. and suddenly plan my whole life.
valueAdd: Through compassion and kindness — because real change begins with empathy. I want to uplift others by showing that strength doesn’t always have to be loud; sometimes it’s the quiet act of caring, listening, and helping people believe in themselves again. I believe one person’s kindness can create a ripple effect that inspires others to do the same — and that’s how I want to serve my nation.
supportNeeded: Accountability partner, Friendship & community, Mentorship / guidance, Hobby partner (e.g. fitness, art, music, etc.), Skill exchange / learning
supportNeededList: Hobby partner (e.g. fitness, art, music, etc.)
supportDetails: Right now, I’m looking for an accountability partner who can keep me consistent and push me when I start to lose momentum, along with a supportive community of like-minded Warriors who value friendship, growth, and real connection. I’d also love mentorship and guidance from those with more experience, especially in areas of personal growth, trading, and leadership. Having a fitness buddy to stay motivated together would be amazing too — and I’m always open to skill exchange and learning with people who are just as hungry to grow as I am. 💫

biggestLearning: My biggest learning from Enlightened Warrior Camp is realizing that I am far more powerful than I ever believed. I discovered how truly blessed I am and how much love and how many gifts I have to share with the world. This experience awakened a deep desire in me to give, to contribute, and to live fully in my purpose. Most importantly, I learned to stop playing small — because there is absolutely no reason to. I have too much to offer, too much light to share, to hold back any longer.
favoriteMoment: My favorite moment at Enlightened Warrior Camp was the warrior initiation. I had many powerful experiences, but that moment stood out above all. It was pure joy — I felt my heart leap open, as if everything that had been holding me back simply released. The initiation marked a deep inner shift for me, a moment of freedom and empowerment that I will never forget.
wordsOfEncouragement: To my fellow warriors: I am so deeply grateful for this experience and for each and every one of you. This journey reminded me that, although it is deeply personal and internal, it is not one we can walk alone. Every one of you served as a mirror, reflecting parts of myself I needed to see, and I learned so much from your courage, vulnerability, and transformation. Having our nation, our tribe, and the smaller circles within it was truly invaluable — a space where we could discover our leadership, strength, and heart together. I loved the camaraderie, the openness, and the shared commitment to growth that made our collective energy so powerful and contagious. Most of all, I am deeply thankful that we now share this lasting connection — that we can continue to support and uplift one another even beyond the camp. I feel so blessed knowing that I have found my tribe, and that I will never walk this path alone again.
funFact: I won a lottery. Not the money one, but a visa lottery - that's how i became a US citizen :)
valueAdd: I seek to uplift my nation by contributing to the collective greatness of our people and humanity as a whole. I’m deeply committed to creating a better, more compassionate world — one built on courage, understanding, and love. As a systems thinker, I can see the complex interconnectedness of things and translate that complexity into clarity. Whether in health, biology, or social systems, I have the ability to simplify information and make it accessible to others. I see myself as a bridge between science and everyday understanding — helping people make informed, empowered choices. I bring warmth, empathy, and genuine enthusiasm for others’ success, believing that when one of us rises, we all rise together.
supportNeeded: Business collaboration, Friendship & community, Skill exchange / learning
supportDetails: I’m looking for a kind of support that comes from strong, self-aware people who are committed to greatness and excellence. I value individuals who can both understand and challenge other strong, driven people — those who are pursuing their dreams with purpose. I want to be surrounded by people who aren’t afraid to offer honest feedback with compassion, who can gently point out blind spots, and who recognize when it’s time to ask for or offer support. I may have an instinct to do everything on my own, but I know that true growth happens in community with others who are equally dedicated to becoming their best selves.

I’ve sailed across the ocean, went into the Borneo rainforest to find lost culture, spent four days and nights alone in three different forests, and completed a 45-day silent meditation retreat in a temple. I are creating an international expedition tribe — a group of explorers, artists, and visionaries who travel across cultures and landscapes to uncover the hidden stories of our world.

Our mission is to transform these discoveries into art, performance, and shared experiences, inspiring others to reconnect with nature, humanity, and the deeper purpose of life.

This is not only an adventure and creative residency, but also a business and cultural exchange camp — where collaborations are born, projects are initiated, and new forms of creative entrepreneurship emerge.

I are looking for Warriors of imagination and integrity — filmmakers, musicians, healers, storytellers, investors, designers, and community builders who are ready to walk this path with us.Or who had those souses can share with.

Together, we will travel, create, and build a living movement that merges art, consciousness, and sustainable living and a Youtube Channel— one journey at a time.

biggestLearning: It’s day three of EWC. I’m walking through the Malaysian jungle, five bricks in my backpack, raincoat over my head. The rain is pouring down and suddenly I feel like a little kid again, walking through the rain for the first time. I smell the fresh wood, hear the drops hitting the leaves, and I just feel… alive. While I walk through the mud, I start to ask myself: does it really matter if I reach Peak 5? What will those few minutes at the top even give me? Maybe it’s not about that. Maybe it’s about enjoying every single step on the way. Two years ago, during my police training, I felt the same pain and challenge, but back then, I hated every step. Now, I love every step. That’s the real transformation for me. Realizing that life isn’t about the peak, it’s about the climb.
favoriteMoment: Experiencing the whole event together with my soulmate was something special. Sharing every challenge, every laugh, every moment of growth side by side made it so much deeper. It reminded me that the right person doesn’t just walk next to you, they grow with you.
wordsOfEncouragement: To all my fellow Warriors, thank you for walking this powerful journey with me. At the Enlightened Warrior Training Camp we didn’t just face challenges, we faced ourselves. Together we broke through fears, pushed our limits, and remembered what it truly means to live with heart, courage, and integrity. Every shout of “I am a Warrior!” wasn’t just a word, it was a declaration of who we choose to be. Strong, compassionate, and unstoppable. I’m deeply grateful for each one of you, for the trust, the laughter, the tears, and the energy we shared. Keep carrying the Warrior spirit into your life. Keep standing tall. The world needs more people like you: awake, alive, and fearless.

biggestLearning: My Biggest Learning from EWC My biggest learning from the Enlightened Warrior Camp is that true strength comes from stillness, not struggle. I learned that a Warrior doesn’t fight to survive — a Warrior moves with awareness, leads with heart, and trusts the flow even in chaos. EWC reminded me that courage is not the absence of fear, but the ability to act with fear — to stand grounded, open, and real. It awakened the part of me that knows: I am not here to compete. I am here to create, connect, and contribute — with purpose, discipline, and love.
favoriteMoment: My Most Favorite Moment at EWC My favorite moment at Enlightened Warrior Camp was when I truly let go — when my body, heart, and mind aligned, and I felt my Warrior Spirit awaken. It was that instant when fear turned into freedom, and I realized how powerful it feels to stand tall, grounded, and fully alive. Whether it was during the physical challenges, the tribe chants, or the quiet reflections under the stars, I felt connected — to myself, my purpose, and the incredible energy of my fellow Warriors. That moment reminded me: the real battle is within, and victory begins the moment we choose presence over fear.
wordsOfEncouragement: To my incredible Warrior family — thank you for reminding me what courage, heart, and unity truly look like. Each of you showed up with raw honesty, fierce spirit, and open hearts — and that energy lifted us all higher. Remember: a true Warrior doesn’t fight alone. We rise by holding space for one another, by standing tall when others stumble, and by walking forward even when the path feels uncertain. Keep your fire alive. Keep your heart soft. And when life gets noisy — return to your breath, your body, and your truth. I’m deeply grateful to have shared this journey with all of you. Together, we are not just stronger — we are unstoppable.
funFact: I’m a lifelong learner who believes movement is the language of the brain — and joy is the heartbeat of learning. Born in Penang, I’ve journeyed from teaching English in rural schools to leading a brain-body movement revolution with my signature method, MOVEXERCISE8. 🎬 I once won a gold bar on a TV game show (yes, really!) — proof that luck can sparkle when you least expect it. ❄️ My first snow was at the Matterhorn in Switzerland, where I discovered that solitude and silence can teach louder than words. 🏃‍♀️ My life motto: When in doubt, move it out. Whether it’s teaching, healing, or parenting, I always find my rhythm through motion. 📚 I’m addicted to learning — from neuroscience and trauma recovery to dance, Daoist philosophy, and even the science of structured water. 💡 I reinvented myself at 49, walked out of a life that no longer fit, and rebuilt everything from scratch — with courage, humour, and a trampoline as my daily therapy tool. Today, I’m proud to call myself a teacher, healer, and storyteller who helps others find balance, purpose, and joy through movement. Because if life is a classroom, then I’m still dancing between lessons. ⸻
valueAdd: I uplift my nation by empowering minds and hearts through movement, awareness, and education. Through MOVEXERCISE8 and ReCode, I help children learn better, parents connect deeper, and educators teach with empathy. By integrating neuroscience, movement, and compassion, I’m building a Malaysia where learning and healing go hand in hand — a nation that grows through balance, connection, and purpose.
supportNeeded: Business collaboration, Friendship & community, Traveling buddy / adventure partner, Hobby partner (e.g. fitness, art, music, etc.), Skill exchange / learning
supportNeededList: Hobby partner (e.g. fitness, art, music, etc.)
supportDetails:
The Kind of Support and Warriors I’m Calling In

At this stage of my journey, I’m not looking for followers — I’m calling in Warriors of Light.
People who move with purpose, lead with heart, and believe that growth is a lifelong dance between falling, rising, and flowing again.

I’m looking for a tribe who dares to live consciously, not perfectly — who understand that real strength comes from awareness, compassion, and courage.

✨ The Warriors I’m drawn to:
• Visionaries who want to make education, healing, and leadership more human, heart-centered, and embodied.
• Healers, educators, and changemakers who believe movement, emotion, and purpose are deeply connected.
• Entrepreneurs and creatives who are ready to collaborate, not compete — to rise together and co-create meaningful impact.
• Grounded souls who walk their talk, keep their hearts open, and choose integrity even when no one is watching.

💫 The Support I’m welcoming now:
• Strategic collaborators who can help scale my movement programs globally — from MOVEXERCISE8 to ReCode and Infinity Pathway.
• Partners who align with trauma-informed, neuroscience-based, and heart-led approaches to learning and transformation.
• Communities and networks that honour authenticity, not image — where we can exchange wisdom, uplift each other, and grow collectively.

I believe we are not meant to walk alone.
We are here to build bridges — between science and spirit, education and healing, movement and stillness.

If you feel called to walk this path — to learn, teach, heal, and evolve together — then welcome.
Let’s create a world where balance, connection, and freedom are not ideals… but daily practices.
topGoals:
My Top 3 Goals & Commitments
1. Scale MOVEXERCISE8 Nationwide & Beyond
To train and certify more facilitators across Malaysia and Asia so that movement-based learning becomes part of every classroom, home, and healing space.
2. Launch the ReCode Global Parent Movement
To empower parents to regulate, relate, and rebuild calm, connected families — starting with community workshops and digital programs in 2025.
3. Establish the Infinity Wellness & Training Hub
A dedicated space for educators, therapists, and wellness professionals to integrate neuroscience, movement, and trauma-informed practices — building Malaysia’s first centre for Movement Intelligence.

Thank you for showing up — even on the days when it felt hard. You remind me that we are never walking this journey alone. Your strength inspires me. Your breakthroughs energize me. I am a Master NLP Practitioner who professionally trains parents in healing childhood trauma, emotional regulation, and Awaken Parenting frameworks. As the  Director of Tickle Right Myanmar, she leads right-brain development programs while empowering families to raise confident, emotionally intelligent, future-ready children.

coreCompetencies: Rozwój biznesu, Coaching / Mentoring, Tworzenie treści / Opowiadanie historii / Media społecznościowe / Tworzenie tekstów reklamowych, Wsparcie emocjonalne / Doradztwo, Planowanie / Koordynacja wydarzeń, Finanse i budżetowanie, Gościnność i opieka, Innowacje / Rozwój produktu, Przywództwo i wzmacnianie pozycji (siły, potencjału), Marketing i budowanie marki, Uważność / Duchowe przewodnictwo, Rozwiązywanie problemów, Myślenie strategiczne, Optymalizacja systemów i procesów, Nauczanie / Szkolenia
biggestLearning: Przez dużą część mojego życia szukałem, dążyłem, czasem uciekałem — nie ze strachu, lecz od cichego głosu w moim wnętrzu, który szeptał: „Masz uczyć.” Przez lata nosiłem w sobie mądrość w milczeniu, wierząc, że siła oznacza samotność. Ale podczas Enlightened Warrior Training Camp przypomniałem sobie prawdę. Usłyszałem ją w słowach i zobaczyłem w oczach innych: - że mój spokój jest odczuwalny, - że mój kierunek inspiruje, - że moja prawda przynosi klarowność. To istota tego, kim jestem.
favoriteMoment: Mój najlepszy moment na EWC nie był tym najgłośniejszym. To była cisza, która przyszła później — przestrzeń, w której przestałem próbować być kimś… i po prostu byłem. W tej ciszy poczułem siłę, która nie musi nic udowadniać i spokój, którego nie da się zakłócić żadnym hałasem. To był mój prawdziwy przełom — zrozumienie, że przywództwo może wyrastać z ciszy, a sama obecność może być mocą.
wordsOfEncouragement: Bracia i Siostry Wojownicy, dziękuję Wam za ogień, który każdy z Was wniósł do tego kręgu. Za Waszą odwagę, by się odsłonić, za łzy, śmiech i krzyk — i za te momenty ciszy, w których naprawdę się spotkaliśmy. Każde z Was było lustrem — w Waszym świetle zobaczyłem siebie wyraźniej. Idźmy dalej różnymi drogami, ale z tym samym sercem. Niech nasze milczenie będzie tak samo mocne, jak nasze słowa. Bo prawdziwy Wojownik nie potrzebuje hałasu, by świat poczuł jego obecność.
funFact: Nie jestem zwykłym mentorem, konsultantem lub menedżerem. Oto dlaczego: łączę ekspertyzę prawną, precyzję finansową i przedsiębiorczy zapał, aby tworzyć rozwiązania, które są nie tylko innowacyjne, ale również praktyczne i trwałe. Oto, co wnoszę: - Ekspertyza prawna: Pewność, zgodność z przepisami i minimalizacja ryzyka. - Precyzja finansowa: Rentowność jako system, a nie modne hasło. - Przedsiębiorczy zapał: Sprawdzone strategie budowania, skalowania i osiągania sukcesu. Pracowałem z globalnymi markami, takimi jak Procter & Gamble i News Outdoor Poland, prowadząc projekty warte miliony dolarów i budując sieci reklamowe od podstaw. Gotowy, aby: - Zyskać jasność i pewność w swoich decyzjach biznesowych? - Zbudować strategię, która jest zarówno innowacyjna, jak i praktyczna? - Zamienić swoją wizję w mierzalny sukces? Połączmy siły i zrealizujmy to razem.
valueAdd: Moja ścieżka została wykuta w R.I.T.Z. — Rispect. Integrity. Truth. Zenith. Poprzez Integrity żyję w zgodzie – myśl, słowo i czyn są jednym. Poprzez Truth przebijam się przez iluzję i wnoszę światło w zamęt. Poprzez Zenith wznoszę się ku najwyższej klarowności celu i służby.
supportNeeded: Współpraca biznesowa, Przyjaźń i wspólnota (społeczność), Wymiana umiejętności / nauka
supportDetails:
Idę przez życie ze spokojem, bo wiem, kim jestem. Idę z odwagą, bo wiem, po co tu jestem. Idę z honorem, bo służę czemuś większemu niż ja sam. Mój spokój to nie wycofanie. To obecność. To siła. To istota tego, kim jestem. Przyszedłem na tę Ziemię, by być wojownikiem, który chroni i przynosi spokój w burzy. By przejść przez ogień i powrócić ze światłem. By prowadzić innych nie hałasem, lecz jasnością i prawdą. Uczę tego, co sam przeżyłem. Prowadzę przez to, co sam przetrwałem. Buduję to, co przetrwa po mnie. Mówię nie po to, by imponować — lecz by przebudzić. Zobowiązuję się dzielić moim spokojem,
moją klarownością i moją prawdą — by prowadzić, uczyć, budować i przemieniać. By prowadzić poza granice — z honorem i mądrością. Jeżeli rozumiesz, że w życiu, w biznesie, w każdym obszarze można się na takim człowieku jak ja wesprzeć i można na taką niezależną osobę zawsze liczyć, to powiedz o tym każdemu, kto szuka takiego człowieka do międzynarodowej współpracy biznesowej.

3. Powrót do ciekawej współpracy biznesowej, najlepiej w międzynarodowym środowisku.

The Miracle Warrior Path
ein transformatives Mentoring-Programm für Männer in der Lebensmitte,
die emotionale Klarheit, authentische Stärke und tiefere Verbindung in ihren Beziehungen suchen.

Mein Konzept soll zu klaren Marketing-Systemen werden, mit authentischer Sichtbarkeit und echter Conversion.

supportNeeded: Business collaboration, Accountability partner, Friendship & community, Mentorship / guidance, Traveling buddy / adventure partner, Skill exchange / learning
supportDetails:
I’m seeking partners for two aligned missions:

ruviinuw (France | Provence–Var) — Private bankers and small/starting investors who value tasteful, asset-backed restorations; French agencies/notaires with off-market ruins or farmhouses; owners open to sale or JV; and reliable local contractors. Ideal tickets from €50k; we provide design-led projects, transparent reporting, and clear refinance/exit paths.

essteet (NL) — Brokerage mentors, developers/landlords, and corporate clients to give our “forgotten agents” real mandates while we deliver trained, coached talent with service SLAs. Also seeking scholarship sponsors.

If you can provide capital, warm introductions, off-market inventory, or execution capacity, and want purposeful, premium outcomes. I’d love to walk this path together.
topGoals:
1️⃣ Financial Freedom & Focus
By the end of 2027, I aim to have at least 70% of my income generated passively through long-term investments and real estate projects, allowing me to focus my daily energy on mentoring, creativity, and leadership rather than operational tasks.

2️⃣ Scaling essteet
I’m building essteet into a structured, two-division company (Real Estate & Design) with 40+ trained professionals by 2027, including a leadership circle of managers who each run their own small teams.
Our internal academy and Notion-driven systems will form the foundation for measurable growth, efficiency, and mentorship.

3️⃣ International Expansion through ruviinuw
Between now and 2027, I will complete three heritage restoration projects in Southern France , each blending architectural preservation with modern living.
The goal: create profitable, sustainable models that connect investors, artisans, and communities while proving that beauty can also be a business model.

profession: Business Owner / Entrepreneur, Freelancer / Self-Employed, IT / Tech Professional
industry: Retail / E-Commerce / Sales
coreCompetencies: Business Development, Community Building, Data Analysis / Excel / Automation
biggestLearning: That true strength lies in radical self-honesty. I’ve learned to stop sugarcoating my truth — to own my story, my patterns, my pain — and use it as fuel for growth. EWC showed me that my word is law and that when I fully commit, I’m capable of bending bars, breaking cycles, and leading from heart, not fear. It reminded me that I am the warrior I’ve been waiting for. And she’s just getting started.
favoriteMoment: I’ve had multiple powerful moments during EWC, but the one that truly touched me was the final closing exercise, hearing how others saw “the beauty in me.” To be seen so clearly, so deeply, without masks or roles… that was everything. It felt like coming home to myself through the eyes of others who had witnessed my warrior, my softness, my truth. It was pure. Spot on. And I’ll carry those words with me, always.
wordsOfEncouragement: To my fellow Warriors - What a gift it has been to walk beside you, cry beside you, rise beside you. Thank you for holding space, for seeing me, for challenging me, for celebrating me. We’ve cracked open together - not to fall apart, but to let the light pour in. Stay true. Stay bold. Keep walking with love and power. You are more than enough. And this… is just the beginning.
funFact: I’m building 3 businesses while 'secretly' planning my escape to Spain & Dubai - and yes, I color-code everything in Notion!
valueAdd: I lead by example - with heart, courage, and full presence. I’m not here to play small or dim my light to fit in. I show others what's possible when you choose to rise, again and again, even when it's hard. I uplift my Nation by being the woman who walks her talk, celebrates others unapologetically, and keeps the fire burning when others start to forget who they are. I’m here to remind us: we didn’t come this far to play safe. We came to own it all.
supportNeeded: Business collaboration, Mentorship / guidance
supportDetails:
I’m looking for conscious Warriors who dare to go deep, who don’t just speak of truth, but live it. People who understand the path of radical ownership, emotional mastery, and authentic self-expression.

I’d love to walk with visionaries who are building something real, whether it’s in business, relationships, or inner growth. Warriors who show up fully, call me forward with love and truth, and who aren't afraid to challenge me when I slip into old patterns.

Support for me looks like:
- Space holders with depth and compassion
- Mirrors who reflect both my light and my blind spots
- Co-creators who dream big, execute with integrity, and celebrate the small wins

I’m here to rise - and I’m calling in those who are rising too. Let’s grow. Let’s build. Let’s fly.
topGoals:
1. Build a 6-Figure E-commerce Business by Spring 2026 (Q1)
I’m committed to rebuilding my e-com empire with full focus, smart systems, and a warrior mindset. No more playing small — I’m here to scale with purpose and precision.

2. Become Physically Unstoppable by Summer 2026
Strong body, strong mind. I’m training for power, resilience and energy. Think: early morning workouts, clean nutrition, and a sixpack to match my standards. Warrior mode: ON.

3. Create Location & Financial Freedom (ASAP)
I’m building multiple income streams — from e-com to digital products to trading — so I can live and work freely from Spain, Dubai or wherever my soul feels most alive.

coreCompetencies: Coaching / Mentorat, Renforcement de la communauté, Résolution de conflits, Soutien émotionnel / Conseil, Planification / coordination d'événements, Accueil et prise en charge, Pleine conscience / Accompagnement spirituel, Enseignement / Formation
biggestLearning: Je peux tout faire un pas après l'autre. Et si je râte je peux recommencer. Je n'abandonne jamais.
favoriteMoment: Predicament
wordsOfEncouragement: J'ai aimé donner le meilleur de moi même et ouvrir mon cœur parmi vous. Je n'oublierai jamais ces moments où tous ceux que je regardais donnaient le meilleur d'eux même et souhaitaient le meilleur aux autres. Je vous remercie d'avoir été là. Je me suis sentie soutenue et encouragée. C'était vraiment merveilleux. Je vous souhaite de continuer de croire en vous et en vos rêves et serai heureuse d'avoir de vos nouvelles.
funFact: Je suis comédienne et prof de théâtre depuis que j'ai un petit garçon. Je joue essentiellement au théâtre mais j'ai participé à quelques tournages de films ou de séries. Ce qui est amusant c'est que plusieurs fois alors que j'avais un tout petit rôle ou même que j'étais juste figurante, je me suis retrouvée dans les bandes annonces de films et de ce fait beaucoup des gens me voyaient souvent passer à la télévision et venaient me le dire. Cela me surprend toujours que quelqu'un me dise qu'il m'a vue à la télévision avec le peu de tournages que j'ai fait !
valueAdd: Par mon écoute, mon énergie, je suis aussi fédératrice. Je mets à l'aise par ma bienveillance; mon accueil de chacun. J'aime aussi être sur scène, j'aime danser, animer, chanter. Je suis douce et puissante en même temps. Je suis encourageante. Je sais aussi communiquer, créer du lien avec les gens et mettre en lien les gens. J'aime aussi organiser.
supportNeeded: Collaboration professionnelle, Soutien émotionnel / motivation, Amitié et communauté, Mentorat / accompagnement, Compagnon de voyage / partenaire d'aventure, Échange de compétences / apprentissage
supportDetails:
J'ai besoin d'etre plus régulière dans mes actions.
Quand je n'arrive pas à tenir mes objectifs du quotidien je me décourage et une voix au fond de moi me dévalorise et me trouve nulle.
Tous les jours j'aurais besoin de dire à quelq'un ou à un petit groupe ça y est avancé sur telle chose.
Quand j'ai juste entre moi et moi pour l'instant ça ne fonctionne pas tout le temps.

J'aimerais m'entourer de gens de coeur mais qui ont envie de se dépasser.
J'aime les gens qui sont capables d'écoute sans s'oublier. J'aime m'entourer de gens qui par leur présence me tirent vers le haut; m'inspirent. J'aime rire.

biggestLearning: Be accountable! Trust myself and my team! Don’t “try”—either do it or don’t do it. Commit or de-commit. Participate 100% and NEVER GIVE UP! A strong structure and environment (being surrounded by great warriors) makes it easier to live 100% as my true self. I’ve tasted it and experienced that I am bigger than I ever thought. So remember to remember these precious lessons.
favoriteMoment: During these days, I chose to let go of my fears more and more, and I took one step further in caring for others—something I once believed I wasn’t capable of. I love feeling confident without creating stories in my mind that don’t serve me or the world. I cherish all those moments when I saw myself break through old patterns, and when I witnessed other warriors overcome theirs.
wordsOfEncouragement: Every time we completed a challenge as a team, we celebrated, debriefed, and felt proud of ourselves as a tribe. We were fully present, did what we committed to do, showed up at 100%, embraced our roles, and supported one another. These moments are truly unforgettable. Winning the PEAK prize was especially meaningful—not because of our speed, but because we never left anyone behind along the way. I love our tribe and our Nation! I’m so grateful for every soul I encountered. With some of you, I went through tough lessons; with others, I shared moments of pure joy, dancing together; and with some, even a simple moment of eye contact was enough. We connected with authenticity—learning, playing, crying, rising, and celebrating together through the ups and downs. I also want to thank all the instructors and the SR team. I thank you all with love and peace. <3
funFact: I’ve been living a plant-based lifestyle for over 20 years. My dream is to create eco-villages with a sustainable business that helps people live longer, happier lives filled with peace and love. I'm now just started a new job in New Zealand with my partner, working under a property management company and aim to get a residency there. Meanwhile, I'm preparing to run a business which moves towards my dream. During my off time, I love spending time in the nature, hiking, kayaking and river tracing. Also, I love experimenting healthy yummy food /dessert for people around me :)
valueAdd: I’d love to bring my experience in sustainability, healthy eating and conscious living to inspire others, and co-create a supportive, creative space where we can all grow, share, and thrive together.

I’d love to meet like-minded warriors who care about conscious living, healing, education, and sustainability—people who value authenticity, compassion, growth, and financial empowerment.
